reason: Reduce repeated warning alerts during a known traffic campaign while retaining critical alert coverage.
businessImpact: Missed or delayed latency warnings could hide customer payment degradation.
rollbackPlan: Revert warning threshold to 800ms and confirm alert fires on synthetic latency test.
successCriteria: Warning threshold change has an expiry and owner
Payment success-rate and error-rate alerts remain enabled
Evidence bundle includes ticket, metric baseline, runbook, and peer approval
